calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jul-20-2017 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Fuad Javadov, Defendant/Appellant; no one appears for Plaintiff/Respondent Jovan Johnson

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. All parties and witnesses are sworn.

Fuad Javadov, Appellant/Defendant, testifies on his own behalf.

At the conclusion of the testimony, the matter is taken under submission.

Judge Pro Tem: Robert J. Stumpf. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. (Not reported)

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar May-24-2017 Judgment Entered

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
